chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 98 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections at Flag ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2024. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Syed Israr Ali Shah, Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G along with Syed Ahmed Fawad Deputy Commissioner/D.R.O Khairpur. -.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition is dismissed as no ground having a base on a statutory provision has been forwarded. This polling station in General Election 2018 was in Government Boys Primary School Khair Muhammad Jaro and has been retained there. The petition is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
